_comment: AUDIT TEST CASE: REF + ENCL - Measure Subj → REF, REF → ENCL, ENCL → Body spacing
subj: REF AND ENCL BOTH COLLAPSE SPACING AUDIT TEST CASE
body: 1. First paragraph for spacing audit. This line verifies baseline-to-baseline measurement between ENCL block and first body paragraph when both REF and ENCL are present.
2. Second paragraph for spacing audit. This paragraph confirms consistent paragraph-to-paragraph spacing.
3. Third paragraph for spacing audit. Final paragraph before signature block.
